ssml_content: <speak><prosody rate="fast">There is no physical sensation more universally disappointing than a sneeze that decides to simply <emphasis level="strong">give up</emphasis> right at the finish line.</prosody> Your breath hitches. Your eyes close. The dramatic facial contortion begins. The crescendo is building, you are ready to violently expel air like a human dragon. <break time="1s"/> And then... nothing. It vanishes into the abyss. You are left there, mouth slightly open, looking completely ridiculous and profoundly unfulfilled. <break time="2s"/> <prosody rate="slow">Where do the lost sneezes go? Do they just wander the corridors of our sinuses forever? Commiserate with me in the comments.</prosody></speak>
